title: S01 report does not explicitly restate operator daemon reload handoff
impact: Post-merge operator action may be less visible in step-level handoff.
recommendation: Include explicit 'post-merge operator action: ./ai-core.sh daemon reload' line in S01 report notes for config-registry CRs.

title: S01 report body omits explicit tdd_red_evidence field/value
impact: Reduced auditability against required contract wording for config-only TDD RED evidence.
recommendation: Add explicit `tdd_red_evidence: "n/a — config-only registry edit; no new behavioural tests"` to S01 report template output.
